footer.description: A contemporary art museum dedicated to creative expression and cultural innovation, showcasing diverse artistic voices from around the world.

hero.title: Welcome to Marcy Museum
hero.subtitle: Where contemporary art meets innovation and creativity knows no bounds.
hero.description: Discover our curated collection of exhibitions featuring artists from around the world.

exhibitions.title: Our Exhibitions
exhibitions.description: Discover our diverse collection of contemporary artworks from talented artists around the world. Each exhibition offers a unique perspective and invites you to explore new dimensions of creativity.
exhibitions.planVisitDesc: Experience these exhibitions in person at Marcy Museum. Open Tuesday through Sunday, 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM.
exhibitions.currentDesc: Explore our carefully selected exhibitions showcasing diverse artistic voices and perspectives.

visit.findUsDesc: Visit us at our location in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria

visitPage.title: Visit Us
visitPage.description: Plan your visit to Marcy Museum and discover our world-class exhibitions

form.title: Get in Touch
form.subtitle: Have questions or need more information? Send us a message!
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
form.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions, please contact us at info@marcymuseum.com

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: This website uses cookies to improve user experience and ensure the proper functioning of our services.
cookies.p1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help improve functionality and analyze site usage.
cookies.p2:
• Essential Cookies: Required for basic website functionality.
• Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with the site.
• Preference Cookies: Remember your settings and preferences.
cookies.p3: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.
cookies.p4: Some cookies may be set by third-party services such as analytics providers. We do not control these cookies.
cookies.p5: This Cookies Policy may be updated periodically. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of changes.
cookies.contact: For more information, contact us at info@marcymuseum.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Marcy National Museum, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.
privacy.p1: We may collect your name and email address when you contact us or subscribe to our newsletter.
privacy.p2: Your information is used solely to respond to inquiries and improve our services.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Marcy National Museum. By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with the following Terms and Conditions.
terms.p1: This website is intended to provide information about exhibitions, events, and services offered by Marcy National Museum. Users agree to use this website lawfully and respectfully.
terms.p2: All content on this website, including images, text, logos, and designs, is the property of Marcy National Museum unless otherwise stated. Reproduction or distribution without written permission is prohibited.
terms.p3: Ticket purchases and reservations are subject to availability. The museum reserves the right to modify opening hours, exhibitions, or events without prior notice.
terms.p4: This website may include links to third-party websites. Marcy National Museum is not responsible for the content or privacy practices of external sites.
terms.p5: While we strive to ensure the accuracy of the information provided, the museum does not guarantee that all content is free of errors. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of this website.
terms.p6: We reserve the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of the website implies acceptance of any changes.
terms.contact: If you have any questions, please contact us at info@marcymuseum.com.
